trans-unit.source: … validate a JSON document with the new JSON Validate command?
trans-unit.target: … validate a JSON document with the new JSON Validate command?

trans-unit.source: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.target: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, this “How do I” (HDI) \rexample must be used with\ra newer version of 4D\r(v16 R4 and above).
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this “How do I” (HDI) \rexample must be used with\ra newer version of 4D\r(v16 R4 and above).
